title: Coleus venteri

The species is native to tropical regions of Asia and is characterized by its vibrant, colorful leaves. Coleus venteri is often grown as an ornamental plant due to its attractive foliage and ability to thrive in warm, humid environments. This plant is a member of the mint family and is closely related to other species of Coleus.
